title: Audit Gap Set
description: Output of the enumerate-gaps step in audit-issue. A list of distinct gaps discovered across the four evidence axes, classified by severity. No count target — the rubric is severity, not quantity.

severity.description: Severity rubric. Use the rubric, not a count target.

axis.description: Which evidence axis (or cross-axis combination) surfaced this gap.

citation.description: Concrete pointer: `file:line` for code, route + screenshot path for webui, query + row count for db, event + count for event.

evidence_ids.description: IDs of the evidence items that support this gap.

recommendation.description: Concrete remediation instruction including a file:line edit anchor for code-tier gaps.

ux_tier.description: Whether this gap is UX-tier (requires inlined screenshot in the audit doc).

summary.description: One-paragraph synthesis: novel signal first, ≤25% recap of issue body.
